Feature_Description: This procedure is used for the case when the UE moves from one gNB-DU to another gNB-DU within the same gNB-CU during NR operation for LTM (LTM: Layered Transmission Mode).
Feature_Objectives: To enable seamless mobility of a UE between different gNB-DUs under the same gNB-CU during NR operation using LTM.
To allow the gNB-CU to initiate LTM configuration and manage UE contexts in source and candidate gNB-DUs.
To facilitate the exchange of LTM-specific configuration information between gNB-CU and gNB-DUs.
Procedure_Implementation_Steps: 5. The gNB-CU sends a UE CONTEXT MODIFICATION REQUEST message to the source gNB-DU including the information related to early sync and the LTM configuration ID mapping list for the accepted target candidate cell(s). The gNB-CU may send the updated CSI resource configuration to the source gNB-DU. The gNB-CU may inform the source gNB-DU about intra-DU L2 reset configuration.

6. The source gNB-DU responds with a UE CONTEXT MODIFICATION RESPONSE message which includes an updated lower layer configuration, e.g., containing the updated CSI report configuration of the source cell.

7. The gNB-CU may send a UE CONTEXT MODIFICATION REQUEST message for each candidate cell accepted in the candidate gNB-DU(s), containing the information for subsequent LTM or for updating the configurations of candidate cells. The gNB-CU may also provide the lower layer part of the reference configuration to the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may inform the candidate gNB-DU(s) about intra-DU L2 reset configuration.

8. The candidate gNB-DU responds with a UE CONTEXT MODIFICATION RESPONSE message including the updated lower layer configuration, e.g., containing the updated CSI report configuration of the requested candidate cell.

Information_Elements.IE_Definition: ASN.1 definition not provided in context. This message is used to modify the UE context at the gNB-DU.
ASN.1 definition not provided in context. This IE is used to provide the LTM configuration ID mapping list for the accepted target candidate cell(s).
ASN.1 definition not provided in context. This IE is used to include information related to early synchronization.
ASN.1 definition not provided in context. This IE is used to send the updated CSI resource configuration.
ASN.1 definition not provided in context. This IE is used to inform about intra-DU L2 reset configuration.
ASN.1 definition not provided in context. This IE is used to contain information for subsequent LTM.
ASN.1 definition not provided in context. This IE is used for updating the configurations of candidate cells.
ASN.1 definition not provided in context. This IE is used to provide the lower layer part of the reference configuration.
ASN.1 definition not provided in context. This IE identifies a candidate cell.
ASN.1 definition not provided in context. This IE provides CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM.
ASN.1 definition not provided in context. This IE is used to request PRACH resources.
ASN.1 definition not provided in context. This IE is used to request the gNB-DU to provide the lower layer configuration for the purpose of generating the reference configuration.
ASN.1 definition not provided in context. This IE is used to provide the lower layer reference configuration to the gNB-DU.
ASN.1 definition not provided in context. This message is used to respond to a UE Context Modification Request.
ASN.1 definition not provided in context. This IE includes an updated lower layer configuration.
ASN.1 definition not provided in context. This IE includes an updated CSI report configuration.
ASN.1 definition not provided in context. This IE includes the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted candidate cell.

Piggy_Backed_IES_Info: Based on the provided context for Inter-gNB-DU LTM (Section 8.2.1.5), the UE CONTEXT MODIFICATION REQUEST message does not explicitly indicate piggybacking of an RRCReconfiguration message. The RRCReconfiguration message with LTM configuration is sent via a DL RRC MESSAGE TRANSFER message (Step 9) in this procedure.
